name: Kny swap
description:
This is my newest KNY Au! It's where Yoriichi kinda swaps with Tanjiro, and my OCs are here too! ^^

Even tho the bio is short, I literally just copy-pasted a LOT of wikipedia pages(edited slightly to fit my au, of course!) Please check it out and tell me if you want me to make anything else because I will ALWAYS do my best to make it as good as possible! :) Also do whatever Idc!

Oh! and also, Yoriichi and Michikatsu are totally NOT 1 6 in around the timeline of the entertainment district arc, and as for everyone else who swapped with the Kamaboko squad, unless I say otherwise, you totally CAN'T find their ages based on how many years older or younger whoever the squad member they took the place of was than Tanjrio(in the og universe). for example, you totally CANNOT figure out Douma's age based off of how much older or younger Inosuke was than Tanjiro in the og universe.

(sorry if it's confusing, I just don't want to risk breaking any of the rules T~T)
creator: Lunacat91
